title: GoalOS: The Validated Skill Graph
subtitle: Reusable Capability, Chronicle-Gated Memory, and Proof-Carrying Skill Accumulation
focus: Validated Skill Graph / Reusable Capability only
figures: Validated Skill Graph as governed proof-gated capability memory
corrections: Rebuilt figures as cleaner vector/TikZ plates with reduced clutter and improved page flow
Removed preloaded-job ambiguity; custom jobs are generated only after objective and proof level are set
Centered Chronicle Gate as the policy boundary between evidence and memory
Defined skill node schema, graph operations, worth-keeping utility, and falsification tests
Kept mainnet handoff explicit as an external live-network boundary
boundary: No claim of achieved AGI/ASI or empirical SOTA
No live wallet, funds, settlement, or production authority in local mode
Private intelligence remains off-chain; proof and handoff artifacts are governable
